title: Diplochita bubalina
taxonomy: Diplochita bubalina is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the ice plant or living stones. The genus Diplochita is a small group of succulents native to southern Africa. This plant is native to the arid regions of southern Africa and is known for its unique, fleshy leaves and stems that store water for survival. The classification of Diplochita bubalina is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, and the class Magnoliopsida. It is a member of the order Caryophyllales and is closely related to other succulent plants in the family Aizoaceae.
